market_pulse: Competitive activity remains strong across premium venues with Zedd, Tiësto, and Rob Guson driving mid-week engagements; LIV showed solid momentum with April 10-12 resident DJ lineup (Dombresky, Cloonee, Marcos Trous) but engagement appears subdued for Monday-Tuesday.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA using countdown reels and story features for Zedd (4/17) and Deorro (4/18); LIV showing only static graphics for April weekend events
content_gaps.suggested_action: Deploy countdown stickers and behind-the-scenes content for next weekend resident DJ performances

content_gaps.description: OMNIA and XS actively reposting guest videos and influencer clips; LIV's TikTok presence relies on third-party promoters rather than official account engagement
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch hashtag campaign #LIVMoment for guests; feature TikTok/IG Reels from attendees on official @livlv and @livbeach accounts

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting dress code guides, venue tours, and nightlife tips; LIV content focus is event-only
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 15-30 second 'venue tour' and 'dress code breakdown' content for TikTok/Reels to drive engagement from planning-phase audiences
